title: ChargePoint Network Data Demonstrates Charging Demand Continues to Outpace Growth of Charging Infrastructure
text: ChargePoint released network data demonstrating charging demand continues to outpace growth of charging infrastructure. ChargePoint gave EV drivers access to more than 900,000 roaming ports in addition to approximately 375,000 public and private ports that ChargePoint directly manages. EV charging sessions are up 34% vs ports, indicating strong utilization growth and increasing demand for additional charging infrastructure. This data supports the long-term market opportunity for ChargePoint as EV adoption accelerates.
